name: Executive Summary Generator
description: Condense any long document — report, study, proposal, or analysis — into a one-page executive summary tailored to a specific C-level audience, with key findings, implications, and a clear recommendation.
author: accilium

variables.name: DOCUMENT
variables.description: The full text of the document to summarize (paste as-is).
variables.example: Q2 market entry study for the Austrian e-mobility charging market, 42 pages...

variables.name: AUDIENCE
variables.description: Who will read the summary and what they care about.
variables.example: CFO — cares about capex, payback period, and risk exposure

example_input: DOCUMENT: 42-page market entry study; AUDIENCE: CFO focused on capex and payback; LANGUAGE: English
